creator: avangardeena@gmail.com
text:
Hello. I want to install gxine media player, but have this problem. After downloading all components via port and install it one of the most component not installing with this issue: 
Patching for libxine-1.1.4_2
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for libxine-1.1.4_2
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to config.rpath.rej
=> Patch patch-config.rpath failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Help me, just I don't know how fix this problem.
Thanks

How-To-Repeat: Problem repeat anytime and anyway
